# SpatialAudioDebug.DebugDrawRays property

Draws coloured lines for every raycast at runtime (in-game).

Blue = omni room-sensing rays

Green = target ray (clear line of sight)

Red = target ray (occluded).

Note: Rays are always shown in the editor when the node is selected.

```csharp
public bool DebugDrawRays { get; set; }
```
